name: auraflow
description: ESP32 firmware for the AuraFlow water-flow leak-detection sensor (ESP-IDF C; original Moddable JS kept under src/firmware/ts/ as a spec)

scripts.flash:firmware:nostub: scripts/with-idf.sh sh -c 'python -m esptool --chip esp32 --port /dev/cu.usbserial-0001 --baud 115200 --before default-reset --after hard-reset --no-stub write-flash --flash-mode dio --flash-size 4MB --flash-freq 40m 0x1000 src/firmware/c/build/bootloader/bootloader.bin 0x8000 src/firmware/c/build/partition_table/partition-table.bin 0xf000 src/firmware/c/build/ota_data_initial.bin 0x20000 src/firmware/c/build/auraflow.bin' && npm run monitor:firmware
